title: Scarecrow Lady
description: Scarecrow Lady is a new tameable monster with her own sound effects that replaces the wolf
body:
![Scarecrow Lady Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb8e6798c9b072f0c4e23c7bf924a41f07ce3962_0.webp)

# **Features:**

Scarecrow Lady is a new tameable monster teammate with her own sound effects that replaces the wolf

so bones from a skeleton are needed to tame! also use optifine

## **Scarecrow's Tune**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tRZ4DMBN-tc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

When idle she hums a soothing tune sometimes sounding as if more then one heart is within..



##  Origins

Once a normal scarecrow then on a eerie night possessed by a female spirit perhaps two?
